name: ha-mk24
description: Custom Home Assistant cards distributed with HACS.

scripts.deploy: ssh raspi "mkdir -p /homeassistant/www/community/ha-mk24" && scp dist/ha-mk24.js raspi:/homeassistant/www/community/ha-mk24/ha-mk24.js && ssh raspi "rm -f /homeassistant/www/community/ha-mk24/ha-mk24.js.gz /homeassistant/www/community/ha-mk24/ha-mk24.js.map"
